title: Peppery Velvety Russian Beets Soup
description: A silky, pepperspiced beet soup with a sweet grapejuice reduction, perfect for a cozy winter meal.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: Add a pinch of salt while sautéing; season to taste at the end

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion, garlic, and mixed root veggies; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the beets, tomato paste, smoked paprika, cumin, and black pepper; stir to coat and cook 2 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth and grape juice; bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, or until the beets are tender.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Blend the soup until smooth using an immersion blender, or transfer to a countertop blender in batches.
Return the blended soup to the pot, stir in the apple cider vinegar, and season with salt to taste. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Ladle the soup into bowls. Garnish with a swirl of coconut cream or sour cream and a sprinkle of fresh dill. For extra heat, add a pinch of smoked paprika.
Serve hot, optionally with crusty gluten‑free bread or a light side salad. Leftovers can be refrigerated up to 3 days or frozen.
